TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Frank-Walter_Steinmeier, title = Frank-Walter_Steinmeier, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frank-Walter_Steinmeier} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 1, Frank-Walter Steinmeier, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Germany ta' misuw hya' ga Frank-Walter Steinmeier, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 1, Frank-Walter Steinmeier, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Germany ta' misuw hya' ga Frank-Walter Steinmeier, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 3 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *rank-walter s~ɕteinmeier, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣermanj taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *rank-walter s~ɕteinmeier, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
